summary: Completed comprehensive testing of role-based login system and payment features. All authentication flows working correctly with proper role-based navigation filtering. Payment dialog opens as popup, UPI screenshot functionality implemented with eye icon and popup viewer.
passed_tests: Login page shows at root when not logged in
Admin login with admin/12345678 redirects to dashboard
Admin sees all 11 navigation items (Dashboard, Classes, Students, Attendance, Fees, Expenses, Inventory, Calendar, Homework, Staff, Settings)
Teacher login with teach1/pass123 works correctly
Teacher sees only 4 restricted navigation items (Students, Attendance, Calendar, Homework)
Logout functionality works and returns to login page
Parent portal accessible at /parent without admin login
Payment dialog opens as popup (not inline)
UPI screenshot eye icon in transaction history opens image popup
UPI payment mode selection shows screenshot upload field
Fee Types tab and Add Fee Type dialog functional
Day Sheet tab loads and displays payment statistics correctly
All backend API endpoints (83 tests) passing with 100% success rate
Authentication API /api/auth/login works for admin and teacher roles

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all role-based login and payment features working)
